description_long: This is a gold-colored ring with a faceted, polygonal band and a prominent red gemstone set in a raised, geometric bezel. The band features a series of flat, angular surfaces, giving it a modern, almost industrial appearance. The gemstone is round and smooth, contrasting with the sharp lines of the band, and is mounted in a square setting that elevates it above the finger. The overall design is bold and contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and a single, eye-catching stone. The ring appears solid and substantial, likely crafted from metal with a polished finish. Its style is striking yet minimal, with the gemstone serving as the central decorative element.
description: A gold-toned, geometric ring with a single raised red gemstone in a square setting. The design is modern and bold, featuring angular facets and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the polygonal band and the prominent red gemstone in its square bezel setting.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the band and the elevation of the gemstone above the finger.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the angular band and the gemstone's setting from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the band’s width and the raised profile of the gemstone.
